notes:
Launch option: 

PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=1 %command%

Also, the current version of Proton didn't work, for some reason. I used version 3.7-8. After that, it worked perfectly.
title: Leisure Suit Larry - Magna Cum Laude Uncut and Uncensored

notes: Tried PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=1 %command% - also tried all available Proton versions between 3.7-8 - 4.2-9. Game starts, but crashes with pure virtual function call (in older Proton versions crash happens after the publisher logo, in new Proton versions crash happens after menu, after intro movie).
title: Leisure Suit Larry - Magna Cum Laude Uncut and Uncensored

notes: After this parameter on steam launch: PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=1 %command% The game runs great for me, only problem i've found its if you play with keyboard and mouse, the mouse sometimes turns crazy for a second. But if you play with controller i think this will be fixed.
title: Leisure Suit Larry - Magna Cum Laude Uncut and Uncensored
